description_long: This object consists of a rectangular wooden block with a cylindrical wooden handle attached to one side and a large, curved black metal blade or arm extending from the opposite side. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for gripping, while the metal component is robust and forms a semi-circular arc, suggesting a mechanism for striking or cutting. The black metal section is solid and heavy-looking, with a matte finish and some visible surface texture. The overall construction is simple but sturdy, with the wood and metal parts securely joined. There are no visible wires, buttons, or digital displays on the exterior. The object has an industrial, utilitarian appearance, and its form suggests it could be used as an improvised or traditional bomb device.
description: A heavy wooden block with a curved black metal blade and a wooden handle, forming a robust, industrial-looking bomb. The object is solid, with no visible electronics or displays.
description_view_0: The curved black metal blade and the wooden handle are both clearly visible, with the handle angled toward the viewer.
description_view_1: The rectangular wooden block is prominent, and the handle is seen from the side, showing its ergonomic shape.
description_view_2: The arc of the black metal blade is most visible, wrapping around the wooden block, with the handle extending away.
description_view_3: The back of the black metal block is visible, with the handle pointing to the right and the blade curving forward.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: No visible detonation mechanism is present; the object may be triggered by mechanical impact or pressure applied to the blade or block.
